name: dde-agent-lib
documentation:
# dde-agent-lib


=======
#### 介绍
agent工具库，打成pip包，供agent-core、agent-plugin等应用共享使用

classes.name: agent.response.common_response.CommonResponse
documentation: 通用返回

methods.name: agent.fegin.portal_client.PortalClient.get_chat_detail
documentation: 获取历史聊天信息

methods.name: agent.service.memory.memorytool.MemoryService.check_last_contain_pdf
documentation: 检查当前轮对话是否上传pdf文档

methods.name: agent.service.memory.memorytool.MemoryService.find_last_pdf_order_index
documentation: 获取history中最后一个pdf文档的index

methods.name: agent.service.memory.memorytool.MemoryService.retrieve_complete_memory
documentation: 获取完整的memory信息，包括所使用的工具

methods.name: agent.service.memory.memorytool.MemoryService.retrieve_content_from_answer
documentation: 处理历史消息中各式各样的markdown格式和json格式

methods.name: agent.service.llm.langchain_geogpt.LangchainGeoGPT._llm_type
documentation: Return type of llm.

methods.name: agent.service.llm.langchain_geogpt.LangchainGeoGPT._default_params
documentation: Get the default parameters for calling Qianfan API.

methods.name: agent.service.llm.langchain_geogpt.LangchainGeoGPT._call
documentation:
Call out to an LLM models endpoint for each generation with a prompt.
Args:
    prompt: The prompt to pass into the model.
    stop: Optional list of stop words to use when generating.
Returns:
    The string generated by the model.

class_variables.name: agent.service.llm.langchain_geogpt.LangchainGeoGPT.init_kwargs
documentation:
init kwargs for qianfan client init, such as `query_per_second` which is 
associated with qianfan resource object to limit QPS

class_variables.name: agent.service.llm.langchain_geogpt.LangchainGeoGPT.model_kwargs
documentation: extra params for model invoke using with `do`.

class_variables.name: agent.service.llm.langchain_geogpt.LangchainGeoGPT.streaming
documentation: Whether to stream the results or not.

class_variables.name: agent.service.llm.langchain_geogpt.LangchainGeoGPT.model
documentation:
Model name. 
`model` will be ignored if `endpoint` is set

class_variables.name: agent.service.llm.langchain_geogpt.LangchainGeoGPT.endpoint
documentation: Endpoint of the GeoGPT LLM, required if custom model used.

class_variables.name: agent.service.llm.langchain_geogpt.LangchainGeoGPT.request_timeout
documentation: request timeout for chat http requests

class_variables.name: agent.service.llm.langchain_geogpt.LangchainGeoGPT.is_ok
documentation: 默认没有reference

functions.name: agent.config.app_config.get_app_config
documentation:
根据环境变量ENVIRONMENT判断开发、测试、生产环境，并将对应的yaml文件加载为app_config配置
返回值: yaml配置
根据环境变量ENVIRONMENT区分加载的yaml配置文件

methods.name: agent.service.llm.langchain_geogpt_agent.LangchainGeoGPTAgent._call
documentation:
Call out to an LLM models endpoint for each generation with a prompt.
Args:
    prompt: The prompt to pass into the model.
    stop: Optional list of stop words to use when generating.
Returns:
    The string generated by the model.
@limits(calls=call_limits, period=1, raise_on_limit=True)

functions.name: agent.timedTask
documentation:
第一个参数: 延迟多长时间执行任务(单位: 秒)
第二个参数: 要执行的任务, 即函数
第三个参数: 调用函数的参数(tuple)
